entities.mother: a mother reaching into the freezer

scenes.title: The Kitchen Freezer
scenes.background_prompt: A modern kitchen with a stainless steel refrigerator with the freezer door open, a tiled floor, countertops, and a window. No people, no food visible.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A modern kitchen with clean white countertops. A mother in a denim apron over a white blouse stands in front of a stainless steel refrigerator with the top freezer compartment door pulled open. Cold mist spills out from the freezer into the warm kitchen air. She reaches in with one hand and pulls out a frozen pizza box that is completely coated in a layer of white frost crystals, ice clinging to the cardboard edges. The inside of the freezer is visible — stacked containers, ice cube trays, and bags of frozen vegetables, all covered in a fine layer of frost. The kitchen around her is warm and bright, with a bowl of fresh fruit on the counter and sunlight from a window over the sink, making the contrast with the icy freezer dramatic.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place mother in front of the refrigerator with the top freezer open, reaching in with one hand. Place frozen_food (pizza box coated in white frost crystals) being pulled from the freezer. Cold mist spills out.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground, the kitchen floor is composed of large, square tiles in shades of tan and brown with dark grout lines. On the far left, there are lower kitchen cabinets featuring olive green frames, brownish-tan inset panels, and vertical silver handles, all topped with a medium-toned wooden countertop. Above this counter, a window reveals a bright outdoor scene under a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds and three stylized, round green trees with brown trunks. In the center of the scene, a mother stands facing right, leaning toward an open refrigerator. She has brown hair styled in a bun and is wearing a long-sleeved, ribbed green sweater, a knee-length skirt with vertical yellow and light blue stripes, and brown loafers. She is placing a rectangular container of frozen_food into the refrigerator with her right hand; the container is light blue and white and appears to contain a block of ice. Swirling white wisps of cold vapor emanate from the frozen_food and the open freezer compartment. The refrigerator is a large, silver, stainless-steel appliance with its bottom freezer drawer pulled open and its top door swung open to the right. The interior of the fridge is lit with a warm yellow glow and contains three empty white shelves, while the freezer drawer also shows empty white compartments. To the right of the refrigerator is another set of lower cabinets matching those on the left, with green frames and a wooden countertop. In the background, above the mother and the refrigerator, are light tan upper cabinets with horizontal silver handles set against a pale, off-white wall. The overall setting is a clean, brightly lit kitchen during a sunny day.

a woman wearing a green ribbed sweater

taking a container of food to store

feeling satisfied with finishing the grocery task

planning to organize the empty refrigerator shelves

leaning forward toward the open appliance
